description: Deterministic ground-truth pack for Lane 4 stub-mode inventory recommender queries. Expected answers come from SQL against failure_events plus the classical reorder-point formula with lead_time_days=90 and Z=1.65. expected_tier uses INVENTORY_GREEN/YELLOW/RED. Expanded in bridge-work mode to 25 items with site-family coverage for SEMS3D-35674.
